title: Mosaic ceiling of the Florence Baptistery - Wikipedia
highlights: 1225 and around 1330 using designs by major Florentine painters such as Cimabue, Coppo di Marcovaldo, Meliore and the [Master of the  ...    Master of the Baptistery identified by Roberto Longhi. The works have been under almost constant restoration from the late 14th century onwards, with particularly notable schemes occurring in 1402, 1481, 1483–1499 (overseen by Alesso Baldovinetti, who was made "official restorer of the mosaic decoration"), 1781–1782  ...    Covered with mosaics on gold backgrounds, the interior of the dome is split into eight segments.
